mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (recipient_id, sender_id, type, target_type, target_id, title, content) VALUES (#{recipientId}, #{senderId}, #{type}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId}
AND is_read = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET is_read = TRUE WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = FALSE
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM notifications WHERE id = #{id} AND recipient_id = #{recipientId}
